title: Executive certification of periodic reports
text: The principal executive and financial officers shall certify each quarterly and annual report, including that they reviewed the report and that it does not contain untrue statements of material fact.

title: Disclosure controls and procedures
text: Certifying officers shall be responsible for establishing and maintaining disclosure controls and procedures designed to ensure material information is made known to management in a timely manner.

title: Management assessment of internal controls
text: Each annual report shall include an internal control report stating management's responsibility for establishing and maintaining adequate internal control over financial reporting.

title: External auditor attestation
text: The registered public accounting firm that prepares or issues the audit report shall attest to, and report on, management's assessment of internal controls.

title: Real-time issuer disclosures
text: Issuers shall disclose to the public on a rapid and current basis such additional information concerning material changes in financial condition or operations.

title: Records retention
text: Audit or review workpapers and related records shall be retained for not less than seven years in accordance with applicable requirements.

title: Whistleblower protection
text: Companies shall not discharge, demote, suspend, threaten, or discriminate against employees who lawfully provide information regarding fraud against shareholders.

title: Tampering with records
text: Altering, destroying, mutilating, or concealing records with the intent to impair their integrity or availability for use in an official proceeding is prohibited.
